currentServices.description: Weekly/biweekly property inspections for absentee owners
Complete rental management including tenant placement, rent collection, maintenance
Pre-arrival prep, vendor coordination, seasonal transitions
Coordinating and managing property service vendors
currentServices.revenueModel: Included in management or coordination fee

offerLadder.target: Entry-level absentee homeowners, snowbirds testing the service
offerLadder.conversionPath: Free property assessment lead magnet → Watchdog trial → upgrade to Guardian after first issue detected

offerLadder.target: Committed absentee homeowners who want comprehensive protection
offerLadder.conversionPath: Most popular tier. Upsell from Watchdog after first quarter. Content drives here: 'The difference between checking and protecting.'

offerLadder.target: Luxury property owners, investors with $1M+ assets
offerLadder.conversionPath: Position through Results pillar content. Case studies showing ROI. LinkedIn targeting for investors.

includes: Everything in Sovereign for each property
offerLadder.conversionPath: LinkedIn lead gen targeting property investors. Content: 'Managing 1 property is a job. Managing 5 is a system. We built the system.'

stage1_awareness.goal: Stop the scroll. Make them follow.
stage1_awareness.content: Pillar 1 (AI Protection) + Pillar 2 (Lifestyle) — high reach, low ask

stage2_interest.goal: Earn their attention. Make them engage.
stage2_interest.metric: Save rate, comment rate, profile visits

stage3_consideration.goal: Move them from follower to prospect. Capture the lead.
triggers: Lead magnet download (hurricane checklist, property assessment)
stage3_consideration.content: Pillar 5 (Results) + targeted CTAs — proof + clear next step
stage3_consideration.metric: Lead magnet downloads, DMs, website clicks

stage4_decision.goal: Convert prospect to client. Close the deal.
stage4_decision.content: Case studies, testimonials, competitive comparison, pricing transparency

stage5_retention.goal: Turn client into advocate. Generate referrals.
stage5_retention.content: Client spotlight features, referral incentives, community building
stage5_retention.metric: Client retention rate, referral volume, NPS

contentMonetizationAngles: Every disaster-prevention story ends with: 'This is what AI-powered property management looks like. Want this for your property?'
Educational content builds expertise trust, then CTAs offer free assessment: 'Let us show you what we'd find at YOUR property.'
CEO journey content humanizes the brand, then invitation: 'I built this for people exactly like you. Let's talk.'
Lifestyle content creates emotional connection, then soft CTA: 'Love the Treasure Coast? Let us protect your piece of it.'
Result posts prove value, then direct CTA: 'Ready for zero-surprise property management? Book your free assessment.'
